title: Window Resize
description: Add and remove a window event listener using useEffect and its cleanup function.
problemStatement:
Clean up after yourself! Use `useEffect` to add a `resize` listener to the `window`. Return a cleanup function from `useEffect` that removes this listener.

**Requirement:** The effect should print `"Window Resized!"` when the event occurs.
hints: Cleaning up prevents memory leaks and unexpected behavior when components unmount.
expectedOutput: A window resize event listener that is properly removed on unmount
